name: MSI MAG B860 TOMAHAWK WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1851 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x4 - 2x PCIe 4.0 x1 - Support DDR5-9200(OC) - 3x M.2 Slots - Thunderbolt4 Type-C - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort - Killer 5G LAN - 802.11be Wi-Fi 7 (B860TOMAHAWKWIFI)
shortName: MSI MAG B860 TOMAHAWK WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1851 - 1x
description: Gaming-focused ATX motherboard for Intel LGA 1851 with DDR5, PCIe 5.0, and Wi-Fi 7.
